title: End Reset
description: Reset the End dimension with just one command!
body:
# End Reset Plugin

If you have more than a few players on a smp, there is a high likelihood that you have to reset the end dimension often. This can become repetitive, as well as requiring file access to the server. So to combat this, I have created End Reset!

End Reset is a lightweight plugin that allows you to reset the end dimension with just one command, as well as an option to reset it every time the server restarts. Resetting the end will keep the main island at 0,0, as well as the surrounding gateways to prevent any issues and unnecessary loss of builds.

## How To Use
To reset the end, simply run `/resetend`. Doing so will prompt you to confirm the reset by running `/resetend` confirm.

## Config
In the `EndReset/config.yml` file you will find 3 options, aswell as a few running options.

`world-folder-name`
This is the name of the end folder. For most servers this will just be "`world_the_end`", though this can vary by server.

`reset-on-enable`
As the name says, this option will reset the world when the plugin starts. Simply change `false` to `true` to enable this option.

`regions-to-save`
A list of region files to save when resetting the end, **Do not change this unless you know what you are doing!**

## Credits
All Plugin Development is by ([@teakivy](https://twitter.com/TeakIvyYT))

## Support
For Plugin support, Join my discord ([dsc.gg/teakivy](https://dsc.gg/teakivy)) and ask for help in `#❓︱support`
